# Generated by tools/generate_cmm.py - do not edit by hand.
# Hook into CMF shared registration and callback on_actions.
cmf_on_mod_registration = {
	on_actions = {
		hafp_on_register_mod
	}
}

hafp_on_register_mod = {
	effect = {
		hafp_register_mod = yes
	}
}

cmf_on_callback = {
	on_actions = {
		hafp_on_callback
	}
}

hafp_on_callback = {
	effect = {
		hafp_handle_callback = yes
	}
}
